description_long: This is a large, luxurious residential house surrounded by a stone wall and featuring extensive landscaping, including trees, shrubs, and decorative planters. The house has a complex, multi-gabled dark roof with several chimneys and dormer windows, and its exterior walls are finished in a combination of light stone and siding. The front yard is adorned with a central fountain, symmetrical pathways, and a covered entryway supported by columns. On one side, there is a covered outdoor seating area, while the opposite side features a large swimming pool with poolside loungers and two glass-enclosed conservatories. The rear of the house opens to a spacious patio and garden area, with multiple access points and large windows providing ample natural light. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, emphasizing symmetry, outdoor living, and elegant architectural details.
description: A grand, multi-gabled luxury house with stone walls, landscaped gardens, a central fountain, and a large pool, surrounded by a stone fence and featuring glass conservatories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with columns, central fountain, symmetrical landscaping, and the stone boundary wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the covered outdoor seating area, garden features, and the glass conservatory adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large swimming pool, poolside loungers, two glass conservatories, and expansive patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, additional garden space, and the covered entry structure at the front corner.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large windows and glass conservatories
attribute_entryway_design: Grand central entry with double doors, columned portico, steps, and decorative landscaping
